name: SOCRadar
description: Integrate with SOCRadar Extended Threat Intelligence platform to analyze IOCs, retrieve threat feeds, and monitor alerts for digital risk protection

auth_config.note: API key generated from SOCRadar platform Settings > API & Integrations > API Options

actions.name: Analyze IP Address
actions.description: Analyze an IP address for threat score, reputation, ASN/GEO location, whitelist status, and passive DNS

actions.name: Analyze Domain
actions.description: Analyze a domain for threat score, reputation, WHOIS data, and associated threat intelligence

actions.name: Analyze File Hash
actions.description: Analyze a file hash for threat score, malware classification, and associated intelligence

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: File hash (MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256) to analyze

actions.name: Get Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve SOCRadar alerts for monitored assets including brand abuse, data leaks, and attack surface findings

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity: critical, high, medium, low, informational

actions.name: Get Threat Feed
actions.description: Retrieve SOCRadar threat feed IOCs for ingestion into SIEM or threat intelligence platforms

parameters.name: ioc_type
parameters.description: IOC type filter: ip, domain, hash, url

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of IOCs to return

actions.name: Check Token Status
actions.description: Check the status and remaining quota of your SOCRadar API token
